author: IGN YouTube
text:
Moana - Official ‘How Far I’ll Go’ Clip (2026) Catherine Laga'aia, Dwayne Johnson
Don't miss the ‘How Far I’ll Go’ Clip for Moana, a live-action reimagining of the animated film Moana. Hear the classic song from the animated film making its way to live action in Moana, in theaters on July 10.

In addition to Lagaʻaia and Johnson, the “Moana” cast includes Auckland, New Zealand, native John Tui as Moana’s no-nonsense father, Chief Tui; Samoan-New Zealander Frankie Adams, who portrays Moana’s playful and strong-willed mother, Sina; and Rena Owen, from Bay of Islands, New Zealand, as Moana’s revered Gramma Tala.

In Disney’s live-action reimagining of the beloved Oscar-nominated animated adventure, Moana (Catherine Lagaʻaia) answers the Ocean’s call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with the infamous demigod Maui (Dwayne Johnson) on an unforgettable journey to restore prosperity to her people. 

The film is directed by Emmy and Tony Award winner Thomas Kail (“Hamilton”); produced by Dwayne Johnson, Beau Flynn, Dany Garcia, Hiram Garcia and Lin-Manuel Miranda; and executive produced by Thomas Kail, Scott Sheldon, Charles Newirth and Auliʻi Cravalho, who voiced Moana in the animated features “Moana” and “Moana 2.” 

Moana opens in U.S. theaters on July 10, 2026.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Xbox Reportedly Considering Canceling Blade, Shutting Arkane Down - IGN Daily Fix
Microsoft is reportedly considering canceling Marvel’s Blade and shutting its developer, Arkane, down. Plus, Quantic Dream has insisted Star Wars Eclipse is on course despite studio layoffs and claims from striking staff that it could be canceled. All this and more in today's Daily Fix!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Unleash The Avatar - Official Gameplay Trailer 2
Check out the Gameplay Trailer 2 for Unleash The Avatar, a third-person action soulslike RPG developed by Aeos Games. Players will fight through India as Vikram to master combat moves and abilities to dispatch larger-than-life enemies along the way. Get an extended look at a boss fight and narrative-driven cutscenes in Unleash The Avatar, coming soon to PC (Steam and Epic Games Store).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
All 10 Secret & Hidden Bosses in Mina the Hollower
There are tons of enemies to fight in Mina the Hollower, but have you beaten all 10 secret and optional bosses? In this guide video, we’ll show you exactly how to find and access all 10 of these bosses!

Mina the Hollower released on May 28, 2026 and is available for Nintendo Switch, Switch 2, PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Steam.

Timestamps:
0:00 Intro & Spoiler Warning
0:30 Midden
1:37 Maxi
2:28 Dugin
3:42 Mock Moon
4:16 Willis
5:45 Dark Deluxy
6:44 Mirren
7:21 Armand
8:05 Thalassion
9:08 Evra

Virtua Fighter Crossroads - Official Character Overview Trailer
Don't miss the Character Overview Trailer for Virtua Fighter Crossroads, the upcoming installment in the hit action fighting game franchise developed by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio. Players will hear from the development team on the process of bringing Cielo to life for the upcoming title, taking into account his past, desires, where he grew up, and more. Fight as Cielo in Virtua Fighter Crossroads, coming soon.

text:
The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered Physical Edition Puts All the Content on a Physical Cart
Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion Remastered is coming to Nintendo Switch 2 officially on August 11, and the deluxe edition with all the content is available for preorder and comes on a physical cartridge. Not a Game Key Card. Not a code in box. An actual Nintendo Switch 2 cart.

Preorders are live at Amazon now for $59.99: https://zdcs.link/92pjA5

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dead by Daylight - Official Silent Hill Collection Trailer
Check out the Silent Hill Collection Trailer for Dead by Daylight, the hit asymmetrical action horror game developed by Behaviour Interactive. Players can gain access to a new Legendary outfit for Cheryl as part of the Silent Hill Collection that transforms her into Shimizu Hinako from Silent Hill f. The Shimizu Hinako skin is available now in Dead by Daylight as part of the Silent Hill Collection for PlayStation 4 (PS4), PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains - Official Launch Trailer
Step into the Star Wars galaxy with a bold new twist on Monopoly. Watch the Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains launch trailer for this dynamic, team-based twist on Monopoly set in the Star Wars galaxy. Choose your favorite heroes or villains, use their unique powers, and battle with your friends and family across a custom Monopoly board for control of the galaxy. Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains is available now on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 1, Nintendo Switch 2, GeForce NOW, and PC via the Ubisoft Store, Steam, and the Epic Games Store.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
BLADE & BASTARD - Official Trailer (English Subtitles)
Check out the trailer for the anime, BLADE & BASTARD! The series is coming to HIDIVE in 2027!

Dead. Resurrected. Forgotten. Iarumas has no memory of who he was, only a deadly dungeon to explore. With a lone survivor named Garbage at his side, he dives deeper in search of the truth.

#IGN #Anime

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Guns of Eschaton - Official Announcement Trailer
Watch the Announcement Trailer for Guns of Eschaton, an upcoming soulslike first-person Western shooter developed by Eschatology Entertainment and from the mind of the late Viktor Antonov, former art director of Half-Life 2 and Dishonored. Players will embark on a treacherous journey from the East Coast to the West Coast of an America that hangs in the balance. Manage resources, take on difficult bosses with an arsenal of weapons, and master gameplay mechanics from perfect parries to the nick-of-time dodges to survive. Guns of Eschaton is coming soon to PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

#IGN #Gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Sparks of Tomorrow - Official Trailer (English Subtitles)
Check out the trailer for the anime, Sparks of Tomorrow! The series comes exclusively to Netflix on July 5, with new episodes available weekly!

In an alternate 20th century Kyoto, two brothers dream of bringing about the Age of Electricity with their 20th Century Electrical Catalog. However, when Seiroku Sakamoto brings the catalog with him to war and never returns, his younger brother Kihachi Sakamoto is left by himself.
One day, a chance meeting with Inako Momokawa, the daughter of a sake brewer, reunites Kihachi with the lost catalog and kickstarts this dream once more. However, he isn't the only one who wants the catalog...

#IGN #Anime

author: IGN YouTube
text:
BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai Part 2 - Official Trailer (English Subtitles)
Check out the trailer for BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai Part 2! BAKI-DOU: The Invincible Samurai Part 2 is now available on Netflix.

Beneath Tokyo Skytree, in a research laboratory owned by preeminent martial arts enthusiast Mitsunari Tokugawa, a forbidden experiment is underway. 
Using cutting-edge science and technology, the experiment aims to create a clone from the corpse of legendary swordsman Musashi Miyamoto and resurrect him in the present day. 
The mighty samurai has earned every title and accolade of strength imaginable: ultimate warrior, master swordsman, and unrivaled beneath the heavens. And now, his rebirth threatens plunges modern Japan — nay, the entire world — into chaos. 
Get ready to witness this ultimate battle that transcends history, embroiling Baki, Yujiro, the combatants of the underground martial arts arena, and all those who live to fight.

#IGN #Anime
